attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for a user by Service Provider. Note - CaseExact=false which is not per RFC.

attributes.name: externalId
attributes.description: Unique Identifier for a user as defined by provisioning client. Note - CaseExact=false which is not per RFC.

attributes.name: userName
attributes.description: Username of the User. It is a Required attribute and uniquely identifies a User

attributes.name: displayName
attributes.description: Display Name of the User. It is generated by concatenating givenName and familyName.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Used to manage whether user can log into Anaplan system or not

attributes.name: entitlements

subAttributes.name: value
subAttributes.description: The target resourceId of an entitlement. e.g. a WorkspaceId

subAttributes.name: display
subAttributes.description: A human-readable name for the entitlement. e.g. a Workspace 'name'

subAttributes.name: type
subAttributes.description: The type of entitlement. e.g. WORKSPACE, or WORKSPACE_IDS for a comma delimited list of workspaces

subAttributes.name: primary
subAttributes.description: A Boolean value indicating the 'primary' or preferred attribute value for this attribute. The primary attribute value 'true' MUST appear no more than once.

attributes.description: A list of entitlements for the User that represents a thing (such as WORKSPACE) the User has.

attributes.name: emails

subAttributes.name: type
subAttributes.description: The type of email, current only "work" is supported

subAttributes.name: primary
subAttributes.description: A Boolean value indicating the 'primary' or preferred attribute value for this attribute. The primary attribute value 'true' MUST appear no more than once.

attributes.description: A list of emails for the User.
